Featured projects

Quarto Wizard

Quarto Wizard is a Visual Studio Code extension that assists you in managing Quarto projects.

Quarto Extensions

A listing of Quarto extensions using GitHub API to retrieve information from the repositories.

Awesome Quarto

A curated list of Quarto talks, tools, examples & articles!

Quarto Wizard

Quarto Wizard is a Visual Studio Code extension that assists you in managing Quarto projects.

Quarto Extensions

A listing of Quarto extensions using GitHub API to retrieve information from the repositories.

Awesome Quarto

A curated list of Quarto talks, tools, examples & articles!
  • Created Sunday, the 3rd of May, 2026

    Prism

    A Quarto filter extension that attaches format-specific values to a single Div, Span, or CodeBlock and lets each output format pick its own.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionFilterConditionalHTMLReveal.jsTypst
  • Created Tuesday, the 14th of April, 2026

    Code Annotation Fragments

    A Reveal.js plugin that enables fragment-based keyboard navigation through code annotations in Quarto presentations.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionReveal.jsCodeAnnotationsFragments
  • Created Wednesday, the 8th of April, 2026

    Cascade

    A Quarto extension that automatically repeats the heading chain when new Reveal.js slides are created with ---, following the DRY principle.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionReveal.jsHeadings
  • Created Sunday, the 5th of April, 2026

    Fragmention

    A Quarto filter extension that hoists .fragment attributes from empty marker spans to their parent list items in Reveal.js presentations, so bullets and numbers appear together with their content.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionReveal.jsFragmentsLists
  • Created Sunday, the 29th of March, 2026

    A11y

    A Quarto Reveal.js plugin providing accessibility enhancements: skip navigation, focus indicators, reduced motion, high contrast mode, font and text-spacing controls, colour overlays, ARIA slide landmarks, and screen reader announcements.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionReveal.jsAccessibilityA11y
  • Created Sunday, the 8th of March, 2026

    Typst Render

    A Quarto filter extension that compiles Typst code blocks and inline expressions to images (PNG, SVG, PDF) using the Typst binary bundled with Quarto, making Typst output usable across all formats.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionTypstFilter
  • Created Friday, the 27th of February, 2026

    Code Window

    A Quarto extension that adds window-style decorations (macOS traffic lights, Windows title bar buttons, or plain filename bars) to code blocks in HTML, Reveal.js, and Typst outputs.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionCodeHTMLReveal.jsTypst
  • Created Sunday, the 30th of November, 2025

    Offcanvas

    A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap 5 offcanvas sliding panels in HTML documents.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionBootstrapOffcanvasHTML
  • Created Monday, the 24th of November, 2025

    Tabset

    Quarto extension enabling proper tabset navigation with keyboard controls and PDF export support for Reveal.js presentations

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionReveal.jsTabsetNavigation
  • Created Thursday, the 30th of October, 2025

    Remember

    An extension for Quarto to save and restore navigation position across page visits for both HTML documents and Reveal.js presentations.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionbookmarkremembernavigation-tracker
  • Created Sunday, the 19th of October, 2025

    Quarto Extensions Updater (GitHub Action)

    A GitHub Action that automatically updates Quarto extensions in your repository, similar to how Dependabot manages dependencies.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionGitHub ActionQuarto Wizard
  • Created Thursday, the 9th of October, 2025

    Collapse Output

    A Quarto extension that provides the ability to collapse code cell outputs in HTML documents using collapsible <details> elements.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionCollapseDetailsCode Output
  • Created Saturday, the 23rd of August, 2025

    Git Link

    Use Git hosting platforms references (commits, issues, discussions, and pull requests) directly into your Quarto documents.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionGitAuto-linkShort-linkGitHubGitLabBitbucketGitea
  • Created Thursday, the 14th of August, 2025

    Mickaël CANOUIL

    A Quarto extension that provides brand theming and styling for documents (HTML, Typst) and presentations (Reveal.js).

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionBrandTypstHTMLReveal.js
  • Created Wednesday, the 13th of August, 2025

    TOC Depth

    A Quarto extension that provides fine-grained control over table of contents depth at the header level.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionTOCDepthTable of Contents
  • Created Sunday, the 27th of July, 2025

    Modal

    A Quarto extension providing a simple way to create Bootstrap modals in your HTML documents.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionModalBootstrap
  • Created Friday, the 25th of July, 2025

    External

    Quarto extension to include content or partial content from external file.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionIncludeExternal
  • Created Friday, the 11th of April, 2025

    Mastering Quarto CLI: From Authoring to Publishing

    A two-day Physalia workshop on the Quarto CLI covering authoring, multi-format publishing, reproducible research, and brand theming, with R, Python, Julia, and Jupyter examples.

    Open repository →
    WorkshopQuartoTypstRPythonJuliaJupyter
  • Created Saturday, the 5th of April, 2025

    Quarto Workflows

    Reusable GitHub Actions workflows to release Quarto extensions and deploy Reveal.js slides to GitHub Pages.

    Open repository →
    QuartoGitHub ActionReveal.js
  • Created Saturday, the 22nd of February, 2025

    Language Cell Decorator

    Quarto extension to add a decorator to the code cells to display the language name.

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionLanguageDecorator
  • Created Monday, the 3rd of February, 2025

    Div Reuse

    The power of “code/content reuse” for seamless and efficient content creation.

  • Created Friday, the 3rd of May, 2024

    Highlight-text

    Open repository →
    QuartoExtensionHTMLReveal.jsLaTeXTypstDocx

  • Created Tuesday, the 20th of June, 2023

    Version Badge

    Badge is an extension for Quarto to provide a shortcode to display software version or anything as a badge.

    QuartoExtensionHTML
  • Created Thursday, the 15th of June, 2023

    Preview Colour

    A Quarto extension to add preview colour as a coloured symbol next to colour code in HTML, PDF, Typst, Docx, Reveal.js, Beamer, and PowerPoint.

    QuartoExtensionHTMLReveal.jsLaTeX

    Lua Env

    lua-env is an extension for Quarto to provide access to LUA objects as metadata.

    R Lille

    R Lille is an R User Group (RUG) located in Lille, France. R Lille is part of the Meetup RUG network sponsored by the R Consortium.

    R Packages

  • Created Wednesday, the 13th of February, 2019

    insane: INsulin Secretion ANalysEr

    A user-friendly interface, using Shiny, to analyse glucose-stimulated insulin secretion (GSIS) assays in pancreatic beta cells or islets.

    Open repository →
    R package
  • Created Wednesday, the 13th of June, 2018

    MiSTr: Mixed effects Score Test

    Test for association between a set of SNPS/genes and continuous or binary outcomes by including variant characteristic information and using (weighted) score statistics. MiSTr is an improvement of the MiST outputs.

    Open repository →
    R package
  • Created Wednesday, the 13th of June, 2018

    NACHO: NAnostring quality Control dasHbOard

    A shiny-based dashboard to load, visualise and normalise the exported NanoString nCounter data and facilitates the user in performing a quality control.

    Open repository →
    R package
  • Created Thursday, the 3rd of May, 2018

    R and Databases (French)

    A two-days workshop on R and databases (+ web scraping).
